title: oreogrammitis dolichosora
intro: Oreogrammitis dolichosora, also known as the fern O. dolichosora, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical forests of Indonesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of O. dolichosora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of O. dolichosora are commonly made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
